scripts.dev: node -e "process.env.SPIRA_BACKEND_EXEC_PATH=process.execPath; require('node:child_process').spawn('electron', ['./dev-main.mjs'], { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true, env: process.env }).on('exit', (code) => process.exit(code ?? 0));"
scripts.dev:external: node -e "process.env.SPIRA_EXTERNAL_BACKEND='1'; require('node:child_process').spawn('electron', ['./dev-main.mjs'], { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true, env: process.env }).on('exit', (code) => process.exit(code ?? 0));"
